case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. WAYNE JIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-14-2020 CONTINUED TO SEP-22-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-22-2020 CONTINUED TO DEC-22-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-22-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT JIN, WAYNE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-19-2019

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $258.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 65916743) AS TO DEFENDANT JIN, WAYNE

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 65916743) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 65916743) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JIN, WAYNE $3,060.45 PRINCIPAL, $258.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,319.40, SEE SCANNED DOC
